items.title: U.K. charges three men with arson over attack on Jewish community ambulances
items.summary: The ambulances ‌were set on fire on March 23 ‌in what British Prime Minister ‌Keir ⁠Starmer described as a “deeply ⁠shocking antisemitic arson attack”.

items.summary: A Cal Fire map showed the fire burning in a recreational area near the city of Moreno Valley, which has a population of roughly 200,000. The city is 103 km east of Los Angeles.

items.title: Collapse of Tokyo's aging cherry blossom trees during viewing season raises safety concerns
items.summary: Last year, 85 trees fell in Tokyo parks, injuring three people, and many were cherry trees, according to Masakazu Noguchi, a Tokyo metropolitan official in charge of public parks

items.title: Bahrain cracks down on dissent as Iran war reignites internal unrest

items.title: Bangladesh cuts office hours, turns off wedding lights to save energy

items.title: U.S. experts say American strikes on Iran may amount to war crimes

items.title: White House seeks $1.5 trillion defence budget as Iran war drives costs
items.summary: Trump requests a ‌10% cut in ‌non-defence and discretionary ‌spending ⁠for the ⁠2027 fiscal year and an ​increase to ‌defence spending by $500 billion, according to ‌a White ​House budget document

items.title: Trump unveils 100% tariff on some patented drugs on ’Liberation Day’ anniversary
items.summary: Companies that have signed a “most favoured nation” pricing deal and are actively building facilities in the U.S. to onshore production of patented pharmaceuticals and their ingredients will have a 0% tariff

items.title: Trump announces destruction of Iran's tallest bridge
items.summary: Trump posted footage on social media of smoke rising from the B1 bridge in Karaj, around 35 km southwest of Tehran — and warned that there would be further destruction unless Iran comes to the table to end the five-week war
